creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Hi,

I just upgraded chromium from 98.0.4758.102 to 98.0.4758.102_3 and since then I am unable to open any website in it. There is no error message or crash it starts as usual but every url that is entered just triggers kind of an "endless loop" (the spinner icon on the tab starts spinning) and absolutely nothing happens. There isn't even a timeout error as one would expect after some time. It just does nothing.

FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p7
Packages installed via pkg
chromium-98.0.4758.102_3
network is ip6 and ip4

Kind regards,

Jens
